title: gh-131936: Relax assertion in `_Py_CalculateSuggestions`
author: ZeroIntensity
body:
Another option is to validate that `_generate_suggestions` is given exactly a list, but I don't see why we should require that. I'm not adding a blurb entry because `_generate_suggestions` is solely internal.

<!-- gh-issue-number: gh-131936 -->
* Issue: gh-131936
<!-- /gh-issue-number -->

comments.author: ZeroIntensity
comments.body: I put up #131945 as an alternative. I'm not sure what the rule/expected behavior is for `PyList` APIs and subclasses, so I'll leave this open for now.
